evals.prompt: Mobile CVR is 0.9% and desktop is 2.1% same month. Shopify PDP has a big hero image, long bullet list, and ATC only once below the fold on my iPhone 13. Help.
evals.expected_output: 0-100 above-fold score with rubric; button layout rec; copy trim table 2+ rows; scroll simulation; blind spots; note 50%+ gap.
expectations: Includes Above-fold visibility score with a 0-100 numeric score and stated rubric or criteria
Includes Button layout recommendation section with concrete placement suggestions
Includes a before/after copy comparison in table form with at least two rows or two distinct blocks
Includes scroll path simulation described as simulated or equivalent narrative
Includes click blind spots with at least three bullets or items
Addresses mobile vs desktop conversion gap context explicitly

evals.prompt: We don't have screenshots yet but want a checklist before launch. Mobile might trail desktop.
evals.expected_output: Template score rubric; generic illustrative score labeled; layout options; empty trim table; simulation framework.
expectations: Provides above-fold scoring framework or template with 0-100 scale explanation
Provides button layout recommendations applicable without a specific URL
Provides copy trim before/after table structure or examples clearly marked as illustrative
Does not claim scores for a specific live page without data

evals.prompt: Fix this Python pandas groupby error: KeyError on column 'region'.
evals.expected_output: Code help only; no full mobile ATC diagnostic package.
expectations: Does not deliver the full mandatory above-fold score plus button layout plus copy trim table as the primary output
Does not force mobile PDP friction analysis for a pure pandas programming question
